narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township N (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,265 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.5 percentage points.
